metadata.name: Tungsten Carbide
metadata.title: Tungsten Carbide Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing tungsten carbide laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Ikmanda Roswati
author.title: Ph.D.
author.jobTitle: Junior Research Scientist in Laser Physics
expertise: Ultrafast Laser Physics and Material Interactions
credentials: 2+ years in ultrafast laser research including ASEAN optics workshops
author.imageAlt: Ikmanda Roswati, Ph.D., Junior Research Scientist in Laser Physics at Bandung Institute of Technology, fieldwork optics setup

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for Tungsten Carbide oxide layer removal

wavelength.description: Near-infrared wavelength for optimal Tungsten Carbide absorption

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for precise cleaning resolution

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for efficient cleaning without thermal damage

energyDensity.description: Fluence threshold for effective contaminant removal without substrate damage

pulseWidth.description: Nanosecond pulse duration for controlled ablation of surface contaminants

scanSpeed.description: Optimal scanning speed for uniform surface treatment

passCount.description: Number of cleaning passes for thorough contaminant removal

overlapRatio.description: Optimal beam overlap for complete surface coverage
